expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.md exists at the expected path

expectations.text: Report correctly identifies this as a dotfiles/stow-based repo
expectations.evidence: Stack section identifies 'GNU Stow, Bubbletea (Go TUI), LazyVim (Neovim), Oh My Zsh' and lists 12 top-level stow packages

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: Findings span Architecture & Coupling (model.go), Code Health (PATH duplication), Data Integrity (stow --adopt), Reliability (unquoted vars, discarded errors), Maintainability (hardcoded paths, comments)

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: 'What's Working Well' section with 7 bullet points covering stow layout, installer, auto-sync, Go architecture, thread safety, conditional activation, and CLAUDE.md

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes file:line references, e.g., 'link.sh:46', 'zsh/.zshrc:181', 'model.go:91'
Section titled 'Top Findings (ranked by impact)', numbered 1-7 with severity labels (high/medium) plus a 'Lower Priority' section

expectations.text: At least 2 findings include concrete suggestions
expectations.evidence: Every finding has a 'Direction' field with specific suggestions, e.g., 'Replace --adopt with plain stow $folder -v', 'Split into model.go, keys.go, render.go, poll.go'
